title: MTA - New York City Subway Signs
description: A decorative Minecraft mod adding NYC subway-inspired station signs, MTA-style route markers and transit signage blocks.
body:
# MTA - New York City Subway Signs

Bring the iconic look of the **New York City Subway** into Minecraft with a detailed collection of MTA-inspired subway signs.

This mod adds decorative subway signage based on the visual style of the New York City transit system, perfect for building realistic metro stations, underground platforms, city maps, roleplay servers, transit hubs, and modern urban environments.

---

## Features

- MTA-inspired subway station signs
- New York City Subway style design
- Perfect for metro stations, city builds, transport maps, and roleplay servers
- Decorative blocks for realistic transit environments
- Clean, recognizable, and immersive signage
- Great for builders who want an authentic urban subway atmosphere

---

## Best used for

- Subway and metro station builds
- New York City themed maps
- Modern city projects
- Minecraft transit systems
- Roleplay servers
- Train and transportation hubs
- Underground station decoration

---

## Official Website

Visit the official mathusallem Minecraft website for more projects, updates, and downloads:

[🌐 minecraft.mnetwork.ro](https://minecraft.mnetwork.ro/?utm_source=modrinth)

---

## Support the Project

If you enjoy my work and want to support future Minecraft transit sign mods, you can support me on Patreon:

[![Patreon](https://cdn.simpleicons.org/patreon/FF424D)](https://www.patreon.com/cw/mathusallem)

[**Support on Patreon →**](https://www.patreon.com/cw/mathusallem)

Your support helps me continue creating high-quality Minecraft signage mods inspired by real transit systems.

---

## Notes

This is a fan-made Minecraft mod inspired by New York City subway signage.  
It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to the Metropolitan Transportation Authority / MTA.

---
